---
title: "Margin Table Simple Test"
papersize: us-letter
format:
  typst:
    keep-typ: true
_quarto:
  tests:
    typst:
      ensureTypstFileRegexMatches:
        # Table in margin div uses #notefigure( for proper margin placement
        - ['#notefigure\(', 'kind: "quarto-float-tbl"']
        - []
      ensurePdfRegexMatches:
        - ['Table 1']
        - []
      noErrors: default
---

This tests a simple markdown table placed in the margin.

::: {.column-margin}

| A | B | C |
|---|---|---|
| 1 | 2 | 3 |
| 4 | 5 | 6 |

: Margin Table {#tbl-margin}

:::

See @tbl-margin for the table in the margin.

More text in the main column to show the layout.
